name: Quaker Multigrain
recipeInstructions:
1. For Welbilt/DAK and Zojirushi machines, add an additional 3 tablespoons of buttermilk.
2. For the Welbilt machine, add an additional tablespoon of buttermilk.
3. Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature. If using a Hitachi machine, microwave liquids for 1 minute before proceeding.
4. Place all ingredients in the bread pan according to the manufacturer's instructions.
5. Use the light setting.
Helpful Hints: Courtesy of Dale & Gail Shipp, Columbia, MD.
